title: Character
description: A single Disney character record sourced from the Disney Wiki.

_id.description: Auto-incrementing numeric character id assigned by the service.

name.description: Display name of the Disney character.

films.description: Feature films in which the character appears.

shortFilms.description: Short films in which the character appears.

tvShows.description: TV shows in which the character appears.

videoGames.description: Video games in which the character appears.

parkAttractions.description: Disney park attractions in which the character appears.

allies.description: Named allies of the character within Disney canon.

enemies.description: Named enemies of the character within Disney canon.

alignment.description: Moral alignment of the character (e.g. Good, Bad, Neutral) when known.

sourceUrl.description: Upstream Disney Wiki URL from which the record was sourced.

imageUrl.description: URL of a character thumbnail image hosted on the Disney Fandom Wiki CDN.

url.description: Canonical self URL for this character record.
